channel.title: Fishing on Bogstandard
channel.description: Recent content in Fishing on Bogstandard

item.title: Fisherman's Menu App (MacOS)
item.description:
All the things you need, hopefully

Looking up tide times online to go coastal cycling/fishing got kind of old, so I slung together a SwiftBar plugin to show tide times and the shipping forecast for current conditions and next 24hrs, it’s UK only, but if you are in the UK, you can pick any location and shipping area & it’ll “just work”. At time of posting it refreshes every half hour. Don’t need more than that, right? Find it here on my GitHub.
